productDisplayName: Skechers Men Heisman Charcoal Casual Shoes
description: Take home the trophy for cool casual style in the skechers Diameter-Heisman shoe. With a smooth and oiled leather upper in a sport casual slip on style, this pair comes with stitching, overlay and perforation accents. Team these sneakers with jeans and semi-formal t-shirts to work or simply wear them on casual occasions.UpperSmooth leather upper with overlays for durability, comfort and styleLeather overlays on front, sides and heelLace-up system with metallic eyelets for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for in-step comfortSoft fabric shoe lining for all-day comfortMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortRelaxed step comfort insole for superior supportCushioned midsole with shock absorption technology for durability and impact protectionRetro vulcanised rubber midsole for a classic lookOutsoleFlexible rubber traction outsole with multi-directional grooves and lugs for stability and supportTextured toe bumper and midsole stripe for durabilityShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
